Index.title: VidioCV - Transform Your Recruitment
Index.description: VidioCV: A revolutionary platform that replaces static resumes with dynamic, AI-enhanced video profiles for modern recruitment.

hero.subtitle: Stop sending paper. Start showing your potential with AI-verified video portfolios that capture the human signal.

workflow.title: The Kinetic Workflow
workflow.subtitle: From digital signal to human connection in three strategic phases.

step1.title: Record Identity
step1.desc: Use our zero-lag studio to capture your professional narration.

step2.title: AI-Verify
step2.desc: Our intelligence engine validates skills and optimizes your match score.

step3.title: Global Match
step3.desc: Unlock high-fidelity inquiries from elite hiring partners.

features.title: High Fidelity Sourcing
features.description: Experience the fusion of human personality with predictive analysis. Our engine handles the complexity so you can focus on connection.

inquiries.title: Smart Inquiries
inquiries.desc: Recruiters can secure introductions without the overhead of immediate scheduling.

watchboard.title: CV Watchboard
watchboard.desc: Watch high-definition video portfolios directly from your workspace.

matching.title: Neural Matching
matching.desc: Our AI prioritizes candidates based on true professional chemistry.

mesh.title: Global Mesh
mesh.desc: Sync your professional identity with hiring partners worldwide.

Footer.tagline: The future of professional identity is kinetic. Bridging the gap between digital presence and human connection.

legal.encryption: All video portfolios and neural match data are protected by bank-level encryption.

cookie.title: Cookie Preference
cookie.description: We use cookies to synchronize your recruitment experience and optimize our Neural Match AI. Read our {privacyLink} for full details.

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account
login.verified: Account verified successfully! You can now sign in.

errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
errors.network: A network error occurred. Please try again.
